lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hi! Nice to meet you. I'm Li Wei.
lines.zh: 你好！很高兴认识你。我叫李伟。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Nice to meet you too, Li Wei. I'm Sarah. Are you new here?
lines.zh: 我也很高兴认识你，李伟。我是莎拉。你是新来的吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, I just started working in the marketing department.
lines.zh: 是的，我刚来市场部工作。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: That's great! Welcome aboard. Let me know if you need any help.
lines.zh: 太好了！欢迎加入。如果需要帮忙就告诉我。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hey Mike! Long time no see! How have you been?
lines.zh: 嘿，迈克！好久不见！你最近怎么样？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Wow, it's been ages! I've been doing well. I moved to Shanghai last year.
lines.zh: 哇，真是好久不见了！我挺好的。去年我搬到了上海。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Really? How do you like it there?
lines.zh: 真的吗？你觉得那里怎么样？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It's busy but exciting. You should come visit sometime!
lines.zh: 很忙碌但也很精彩。你应该找时间来玩！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I'd love to! Let's make a plan.
lines.zh: 我很想去！我们定个计划吧。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Professor Chen, I'd like to introduce my colleague, Dr. Wang.
lines.zh: 陈教授，我想给您介绍我的同事王博士。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Hello, Dr. Wang. I've read your papers on climate research. Impressive work.
lines.zh: 你好，王博士。我读过您关于气候研究的论文。非常出色。

lines.speaker: C
lines.en: Thank you, Professor Chen. I'm honored to meet you.
lines.zh: 谢谢您，陈教授。很荣幸见到您。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let's grab a seat and continue our discussion.
lines.zh: 我们坐下继续聊吧。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you have any siblings?
lines.zh: 你有兄弟姐妹吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I have an older sister. She's a doctor in Beijing.
lines.zh: 有，我有个姐姐。她在北京当医生。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's impressive! Is she older than you by much?
lines.zh: 真厉害！她比你大很多吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: She's three years older. We're pretty close.
lines.zh: 她比我大三岁。我们关系很好。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's nice. My brother lives abroad, so I don't see him often.
lines.zh: 真好。我哥哥住在国外，所以不常见面。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Are you doing anything this weekend?
lines.zh: 这周末你有什么安排吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Not really. Why do you ask?
lines.zh: 没什么特别的。怎么这么问？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: A few friends and I are having a barbecue on Saturday. You should come!
lines.zh: 我和几个朋友周六要烧烤。你也来吧！

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sounds fun! What should I bring?
lines.zh: 听起来不错！我需要带点什么吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Just bring yourself. Maybe some drinks if you'd like.
lines.zh: 人来了就行。如果想带点饮料也可以。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Alright, I'll bring some craft beer. See you Saturday!
lines.zh: 好的，我带点精酿啤酒。周六见！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I can't believe it's been five years since graduation!
lines.zh: 真不敢相信毕业已经五年了！

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Time flies. Remember that crazy road trip we took?
lines.zh: 时间过得真快。还记得我们那次疯狂的公路旅行吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How could I forget? We got lost somewhere in the mountains.
lines.zh: 怎么可能忘记。我们在山里迷路了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: And we ended up at that little village. The locals were so kind.
lines.zh: 结果我们去了那个小村庄。当地人特别热情。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: We should plan another trip soon. It's been too long.
lines.zh: 我们应该尽快再计划一次旅行。太久没去了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: When would be a good time for you to meet?
lines.zh: 你什么时候方便见面？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: How about next Tuesday afternoon? Around 2 PM?
lines.zh: 下周二下午怎么样？大概两点左右？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let me check my calendar. Yes, Tuesday at 2 works for me.
lines.zh: 我看一下日历。好的，周二两点可以。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Perfect. Shall we meet at the usual coffee shop?
lines.zh: 太好了。我们在常去的那家咖啡馆碰面吧？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sure. See you next Tuesday at 2.
lines.zh: 好的。下周二两点见。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What's the date today?
lines.zh: 今天几号？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It's March fifteenth.
lines.zh: 今天是3月15号。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Oh, the deadline for the report is the day after tomorrow.
lines.zh: 哦，报告截止日期是后天。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: That's March seventeenth. Do you have enough time?
lines.zh: 那就是3月17号。你时间够吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I think so. I'll finish it tomorrow evening.
lines.zh: 应该够。我明天晚上之前完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good evening, welcome to Sichuan Kitchen. Here's the menu.
lines.zh: 晚上好，欢迎光临川味轩。这是菜单。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thanks. What would you recommend?
lines.zh: 谢谢。你有什么推荐的吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Our mapo tofu is very popular, and the kung pao chicken is a classic.
lines.zh: 我们的麻婆豆腐很受欢迎，宫保鸡丁也是一道经典菜。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'll try the mapo tofu and a bowl of steamed rice.
lines.zh: 我来一份麻婆豆腐和一碗米饭。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Would you like anything to drink?
lines.zh: 想喝点什么吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Just some hot green tea, please.
lines.zh: 就一杯热绿茶吧。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, I'd like to make a reservation for tonight.
lines.zh: 你好，我想预订今晚的座位。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure. How many people will be dining?
lines.zh: 好的。请问几位用餐？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Four adults and two children.
lines.zh: 四个大人和两个孩子。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: We have a table available at 6:30 or 7:30 PM.
lines.zh: 晚上6点半或7点半有空位。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: 7:30 works better for us. Under the name Wang, please.
lines.zh: 7点半更适合我们。请用王先生的名字预订。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Got it. A table for six at 7:30 tonight. We'll see you then.
lines.zh: 好的。今晚7点半，六位。到时候见。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Could we have the check, please?
lines.zh: 请给我们结账。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure. Here you go. The total is 286 yuan.
lines.zh: 好的。这是账单。一共286元。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can I pay by card?
lines.zh: 可以用卡支付吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Of course. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and UnionPay.
lines.zh: 当然可以。我们接受Visa、Mastercard和银联卡。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Here's my card. Keep the change.
lines.zh: 这是我的卡。不用找了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Welcome to Brew & Bean. What can I get for you today?
lines.zh: 欢迎光临 Brew & Bean。今天想喝点什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'll have a latte, please. With oat milk.
lines.zh: 我要一杯拿铁。用燕麦奶。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: One oat latte. Would you like any pastries? We have fresh croissants.
lines.zh: 一杯燕麦奶拿铁。要来点糕点吗？我们有新鲜的可颂。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: A croissant sounds great. How much is that altogether?
lines.zh: 来个可颂挺好的。一共多少钱？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That'll be 52 yuan. Can I get your name?
lines.zh: 一共52元。请问怎么称呼？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Lin. L-I-N.
lines.zh: 林。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: This cafe has such a cozy atmosphere.
lines.zh: 这家咖啡馆氛围真温馨。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I know! I love coming here to read on weekends.
lines.zh: 是啊！我周末喜欢来这里看书。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Their cold brew is excellent. Have you tried it?
lines.zh: 他们的冷萃咖啡很好喝。你试过吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Not yet. I usually get a matcha latte.
lines.zh: 还没呢。我一般都点抹茶拿铁。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: You should try it next time. It's smooth and not too bitter.
lines.zh: 下次你应该试试。口感很顺滑，不太苦。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What should we cook for dinner tonight?
lines.zh: 今晚我们做什么吃？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: How about spaghetti carbonara? I have all the ingredients.
lines.zh: 做意大利培根蛋酱面怎么样？材料我都有。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Great! Can you teach me? I've never made it before.
lines.zh: 好呀！你能教我吗？我以前从来没做过。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure. First, boil the pasta. While that's cooking, fry the bacon.
lines.zh: 当然。先把面煮上。煮面的时候炒培根。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Then what? Do I add the eggs now?
lines.zh: 然后呢？现在加鸡蛋吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Not yet. Mix the eggs with cheese first, then toss everything together off the heat.
lines.zh: 先别加。先把鸡蛋和奶酪搅在一起，然后关火拌匀所有东西。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Got it. Let me give it a try!
lines.zh: 明白了。让我来试试！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: We're out of eggs and milk. I need to go grocery shopping.
lines.zh: 鸡蛋和牛奶都没了。我得去买菜了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'll come with you. Do we need anything else?
lines.zh: 我跟你一起去。还需要别的吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let me check the fridge. We also need some vegetables.
lines.zh: 我看一下冰箱。还需要买些蔬菜。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: How about making a stir-fry tonight? We can get broccoli and bell peppers.
lines.zh: 今晚做个炒菜怎么样？我们可以买西兰花和甜椒。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good idea. And let's grab some garlic and ginger too.
lines.zh: 好主意。再买点大蒜和姜。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Alright, let's go before the market gets crowded.
lines.zh: 好的，趁市场还没人多赶紧去。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, could you tell me how to get to the National Museum?
lines.zh: 打扰一下，请问去国家博物馆怎么走？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure. Go straight for two blocks, then turn left at the traffic light.
lines.zh: 好的。直走两个路口，在红绿灯处左转。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Is it far from here?
lines.zh: 离这里远吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Not at all. It's about a ten-minute walk.
lines.zh: 不远。走路大概十分钟。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Thanks a lot! And is there a subway station nearby?
lines.zh: 非常感谢！附近有地铁站吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, there's one right across the street. You can take Line 2.
lines.zh: 有的，街对面就有一个。可以坐2号线。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I'm looking for a pharmacy. Is there one around here?
lines.zh: 我在找药店。这附近有吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: There's one on the next corner. You can't miss it.
lines.zh: 下个街角就有一家。你一眼就能看到。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Is it open now? It's already 9 PM.
lines.zh: 现在还在营业吗？已经晚上9点了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, it's a 24-hour pharmacy.
lines.zh: 是的，那是24小时药店。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Perfect. Thank you so much!
lines.zh: 太好了。非常感谢！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, is this the right way to the highway?
lines.zh: 不好意思，这是去高速公路的路吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, you're heading in the opposite direction. You need to turn around.
lines.zh: 不是，你方向走反了。需要掉头。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Oh no. Could you point me in the right direction?
lines.zh: 哦不。能告诉我正确的方向吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Go back to the last intersection and turn right. You'll see signs for the highway after about a mile.
lines.zh: 倒回上一个路口右转。大概一英里后就能看到高速路的指示牌了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Got it. I appreciate your help!
lines.zh: 明白了。谢谢你的帮助！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Taxi! Are you available?
lines.zh: 出租车！有空车吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, hop in. Where to?
lines.zh: 有空，上车吧。去哪儿？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I need to go to the train station, please.
lines.zh: 我要去火车站。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The east station or the south station?
lines.zh: 东站还是南站？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: The south station. How long will it take?
lines.zh: 南站。大概需要多久？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: About 25 minutes, depending on traffic.
lines.zh: 大概25分钟，看路况。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Please take the fastest route.
lines.zh: 请走最快的路线。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hi, are you Mr. Zhang? I ordered a ride through the app.
lines.zh: 你好，是张先生吗？我通过App叫了车。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, that's me. Can I confirm your phone number?
lines.zh: 是的，是我。能确认一下你的手机号吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Great, that matches. Please get in. Do you have any luggage?
lines.zh: 好的，信息一致。请上车。有行李吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Just one suitcase in the trunk, thanks.
lines.zh: 后备箱里有一个行李箱，谢谢。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No problem. Buckle up and we'll be on our way.
lines.zh: 没问题。系好安全带，我们出发了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Which line goes to People's Square?
lines.zh: 去人民广场坐几号线？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Take Line 1 towards the city center and get off at People's Square Station.
lines.zh: 坐开往市中心方向的1号线，在人民广场站下车。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How many stops is that?
lines.zh: 有几站？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Five stops from here. It takes about 15 minutes.
lines.zh: 从这站过去五站。大概15分钟。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can I use my phone to scan the ticket?
lines.zh: 我可以用手机扫码进站吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, just scan the QR code at the gate.
lines.zh: 可以的，在闸机口扫二维码就行。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, does Bus 52 go to the university?
lines.zh: 请问52路公交车到大学吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, it does. But you need to get off at the east gate stop.
lines.zh: 到的。不过你需要在东门那一站下车。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How often does the bus come?
lines.zh: 公交车多久一班？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Every 10 minutes or so during peak hours.
lines.zh: 高峰时段大约每10分钟一班。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do I need exact change for the fare?
lines.zh: 车费需要准备零钱吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, you can use your transit card or scan your phone.
lines.zh: 不用，你可以刷公交卡或者扫手机。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, I have a reservation under the name Chen.
lines.zh: 你好，我用陈的名字预订了房间。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Welcome to Grand Hyatt. Let me look that up. A deluxe double room for three nights?
lines.zh: 欢迎来到君悦酒店。我来查一下。豪华双人房，住三晚？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, that's correct.
lines.zh: 是的，没错。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: May I see your passport, please? And I'll need a credit card for the deposit.
lines.zh: 请出示您的护照。还需要一张信用卡作为押金。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Here you go.
lines.zh: 给你。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thank you. Your room is on the 15th floor. Here's your key card. Breakfast is served from 7 to 10.
lines.zh: 谢谢。您的房间在15楼。这是您的房卡。早餐供应时间是7点到10点。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Room service. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 客房服务。有什么需要帮忙的吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Could I get an extra pillow and a blanket?
lines.zh: 能再给我一个枕头和一条毯子吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Certainly. I'll have them sent up right away.
lines.zh: 当然可以。我马上让人送上来。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Also, the air conditioning in my room doesn't seem to be working.
lines.zh: 另外，我房间的空调好像坏了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I apologize for the inconvenience. I'll send a technician to check it.
lines.zh: 给您带来不便非常抱歉。我派技术人员去检查一下。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thank you. How long will that take?
lines.zh: 谢谢。大概需要多长时间？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: He'll be there within 10 minutes.
lines.zh: 他10分钟内到。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good morning. I'd like to check out, please. Room 1528.
lines.zh: 早上好。我想办理退房。1528房间。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Certainly. Did you use the minibar or any hotel services?
lines.zh: 好的。您使用过迷你吧或任何酒店服务吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I had one bottle of water from the minibar.
lines.zh: 我从迷你吧拿了一瓶水。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: That'll be an extra 15 yuan. Here's your itemized bill.
lines.zh: 那需要额外加15元。这是您的详细账单。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Everything looks good. Can I get a receipt?
lines.zh: 看起来没问题。能给我一张发票吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Of course. Here's your receipt. We hope you enjoyed your stay!
lines.zh: 当然。这是您的发票。希望您住得愉快！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good morning. I'd like to check in for flight CA985 to Tokyo.
lines.zh: 早上好。我想办理飞往东京的CA985航班登机手续。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sure. May I see your passport and ticket?
lines.zh: 好的。请出示您的护照和机票。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Here you are. I'd like a window seat, please.
lines.zh: 给你。我想要靠窗的座位。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Let me check. Yes, we have a window seat available. Any luggage to check in?
lines.zh: 我查一下。有的，靠窗座位还有。有行李需要托运吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Just one suitcase. I'll carry my backpack on board.
lines.zh: 一个行李箱就行。背包我随身带。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Here's your boarding pass. Your gate is 23. Boarding starts at 9:30.
lines.zh: 这是您的登机牌。登机口是23号。9点30分开始登机。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
lines.zh: 请将您的笔记本电脑和液体物品放在单独的托盘里。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Do I need to take off my shoes?
lines.zh: 需要脱鞋吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, please remove your shoes and jacket as well.
lines.zh: 是的，请把鞋子和外套也脱掉。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Is my power bank allowed in carry-on luggage?
lines.zh: 充电宝可以随身携带吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, but it must be under 20,000 mAh. Please take it out for inspection.
lines.zh: 可以，但必须小于20000毫安时。请拿出来检查。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No problem. Thanks.
lines.zh: 没问题。谢谢。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, is Flight MU567 on time?
lines.zh: 请问MU567航班准时起飞吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'm sorry, but the flight has been delayed due to bad weather.
lines.zh: 很抱歉，由于天气原因，航班延误了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How long will the delay be?
lines.zh: 会延误多久？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Approximately two hours. We'll update you as soon as we have more information.
lines.zh: 大约两个小时。有最新消息我们会及时通知您。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Is there a lounge I can wait in?
lines.zh: 有贵宾休息室可以等吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, there's a lounge near Gate 15. You can wait there with your boarding pass.
lines.zh: 有的，15号登机口附近有一个休息室。您可以凭登机牌进去等候。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Welcome! Are you looking for anything in particular?
lines.zh: 欢迎光临！您在找什么特别的款式吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'm just browsing. But this sweater caught my eye.
lines.zh: 我就随便看看。不过这件毛衣挺吸引我的。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's from our new collection. What size do you wear?
lines.zh: 那是我们新系列的产品。您穿什么尺码？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Medium, I think. Can I try it on?
lines.zh: 中号吧。我能试穿一下吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sure. The fitting rooms are right over there.
lines.zh: 当然。试衣间就在那边。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I'm looking for a pair of running shoes.
lines.zh: 我想买一双跑步鞋。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: We have several brands. What's your size?
lines.zh: 我们有多个品牌。您穿多大码？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Size 42 in European sizing.
lines.zh: 欧洲码42号。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Let me grab a few options for you to try on. How do these feel?
lines.zh: 我拿几双给您试试。这双感觉怎么样？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: They're comfortable, but a bit tight around the toes.
lines.zh: 挺舒服的，但脚趾这里有点紧。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'll get you a half size up. Try these instead.
lines.zh: 我给您拿大半码的。试试这双。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to return this jacket I bought yesterday.
lines.zh: 你好，我想退掉昨天买的这件夹克。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Do you have the receipt?
lines.zh: 您有收据吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Yes, here it is.
lines.zh: 有的，给你。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Is there anything wrong with it?
lines.zh: 有什么问题吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: It's just a bit too big for me. I'd like a refund.
lines.zh: 就是穿起来有点大。我想退款。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No problem. The refund will go back to your card within 5 business days.
lines.zh: 没问题。退款会在5个工作日内退回到您的卡上。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How much is this hand-painted fan?
lines.zh: 这把手绘扇子多少钱？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: 200 yuan. It's real silk and hand-painted by a local artist.
lines.zh: 200元。这是真丝的，由本地艺术家手绘。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's beautiful, but a bit expensive. Can you give me a better price?
lines.zh: 很漂亮，但有点贵。能便宜点吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I can do 160 yuan. That's my best offer.
lines.zh: 160元可以卖。这是最低价了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How about 130? I'll buy two if you give me that price.
lines.zh: 130怎么样？如果你给我这个价，我买两把。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Alright, 130 each. You drive a hard bargain!
lines.zh: 好吧，一把130。你真会砍价！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: This jade bracelet is lovely. What's the price?
lines.zh: 这个玉镯很漂亮。多少钱？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: That's 800 yuan. It's genuine jade from Xinjiang.
lines.zh: 800元。这是新疆真玉。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's more than I expected. Any discount for cash?
lines.zh: 比我想象的贵。现金付款有折扣吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: If you pay in cash, I can give it to you for 650.
lines.zh: 如果付现金的话，650元卖给你。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: 600 and we have a deal.
lines.zh: 600我就买了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Fine, 600. You won't find a better deal anywhere else!
lines.zh: 好吧，600。你在别处找不到更好的价格了！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, Dr. Li's office. How can I help you?
lines.zh: 您好，李医生诊所。有什么可以帮您的？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to make an appointment for a check-up.
lines.zh: 你好，我想预约做个体检。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sure. Are you a new patient?
lines.zh: 好的。您是初诊患者吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, this would be my first visit.
lines.zh: 是的，这是我第一次来。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let me put you on hold for a moment while I check the schedule.
lines.zh: 请稍等，我查一下预约时间表。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No problem.
lines.zh: 好的。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, is this Mr. Johnson?
lines.zh: 你好，是约翰逊先生吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Sorry, you've got the wrong number. There's no one here by that name.
lines.zh: 抱歉，你打错了。这里没有叫这个名字的人。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Oh, I'm sorry. Is this not 555-0123?
lines.zh: 哦，不好意思。请问这不是555-0123吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: No, this is 555-0132. No worries, it happens.
lines.zh: 不是，这里是555-0132。没关系，常有的事。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sorry for disturbing you. Have a good day.
lines.zh: 抱歉打扰了。祝你今天愉快。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What do you like to do in your free time?
lines.zh: 你空闲时间喜欢做什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I love hiking. There's a great trail near my place.
lines.zh: 我喜欢徒步。我家附近有一条很棒的徒步路线。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That sounds nice. How often do you go?
lines.zh: 听起来不错。你多久去一次？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Almost every weekend. It helps me clear my mind.
lines.zh: 几乎每个周末都去。这能让我头脑清醒。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I should try it sometime. I spend too much time indoors.
lines.zh: 我也应该试试。我待在室内的时间太长了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: You should! I can take you next time if you'd like.
lines.zh: 你应该试试！如果你愿意，下次我可以带你去。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I heard you play the guitar. How long have you been playing?
lines.zh: 听说你会弹吉他。你弹了多久了？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: About three years now. I started during the pandemic.
lines.zh: 大概三年了。我是在疫情期间开始学的。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That's impressive! Did you take lessons?
lines.zh: 真厉害！你报课学了吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I learned from online tutorials at first. Later I found a teacher.
lines.zh: 最开始是从网上教程学的。后来找了老师。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I've always wanted to learn. Any advice for a beginner?
lines.zh: 我一直想学。对初学者有什么建议吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Start with an affordable guitar and practice at least 15 minutes every day.
lines.zh: 先买一把价格合适的吉他，每天至少练习15分钟。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Your photos on Instagram are amazing!
lines.zh: 你在Instagram上的照片太棒了！

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thank you! Photography is just a hobby, but I really enjoy it.
lines.zh: 谢谢！摄影只是业余爱好，但我真的很喜欢。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What kind of camera do you use?
lines.zh: 你用的是什么相机？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I use a Sony mirrorless. It's lightweight and great for travel.
lines.zh: 我用的是索尼微单。很轻便，适合旅行。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you edit your photos?
lines.zh: 你会修图吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I use Lightroom for basic color correction and cropping.
lines.zh: 会的，我用Lightroom做基本的调色和裁剪。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Tell me a bit about yourself.
lines.zh: 请介绍一下你自己。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'm a software engineer with five years of experience in mobile development.
lines.zh: 我是一名软件工程师，有五年的移动开发经验。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What made you apply for this position?
lines.zh: 是什么促使你申请这个职位？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I admire your company's innovative approach to AI technology, and I want to be part of that.
lines.zh: 我欣赏贵公司在人工智能技术方面的创新方法，我想成为其中的一员。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Where do you see yourself in five years?
lines.zh: 你五年内的职业规划是什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I hope to grow into a senior developer role and eventually lead a team.
lines.zh: 我希望成长为一名高级开发人员，并最终带领一个团队。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Thank you for coming in today. We'll be in touch within a week.
lines.zh: 感谢你今天来面试。我们会在一周内联系你。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thank you for the opportunity. When can I expect to hear back?
lines.zh: 感谢您给我这个机会。大概什么时候能有回复？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: We have a few more candidates to interview this week. You'll hear from us by Friday.
lines.zh: 这周我们还有几位候选人要面试。周五之前你会收到我们的消息。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Great. Is there anything else you need from me?
lines.zh: 好的。您还需要我提供什么吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: No, that's all for now. We have your portfolio and references. Have a nice day!
lines.zh: 不用了，目前这些就够了。我们有你的作品集和推荐信。祝你今天愉快！

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good morning, everyone. Let's start today's meeting.
lines.zh: 大家早上好。我们开始今天的会议。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'd like to go over the Q2 results first.
lines.zh: 我想先回顾一下第二季度的业绩。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sure, go ahead. Do you have the slides ready?
lines.zh: 好的，请讲。幻灯片准备好了吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, they're on the shared screen. Revenue grew by 15% compared to last quarter.
lines.zh: 准备好了，已经投屏了。收入比上季度增长了15%。

lines.speaker: C
lines.en: That's great news. What about the new product launch timeline?
lines.zh: 这是个好消息。新产品的发布时间线怎么样了？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let's discuss that after the break.
lines.zh: 我们休息后再讨论这个。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I'd like to hear everyone's ideas for the marketing campaign.
lines.zh: 我想听听大家对营销活动的想法。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: What about partnering with local influencers on social media?
lines.zh: 在社交媒体上与本地网红合作怎么样？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: That could work. What budget are we looking at?
lines.zh: 这个可行。预算是多少？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: About 50,000 yuan for a three-month campaign.
lines.zh: 为期三个月的活动大约需要五万元。

lines.speaker: C
lines.en: I suggest we also run a referral program to boost word of mouth.
lines.zh: 我建议我们也做一个推荐计划，促进口碑传播。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good point. Let's combine both strategies. I'll prepare a proposal.
lines.zh: 好主意。我们把两个策略结合起来。我来准备一份方案。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Good morning. What seems to be the problem?
lines.zh: 早上好。你哪里不舒服？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I've had a bad headache and a sore throat for three days.
lines.zh: 我头疼得厉害，喉咙也疼，已经三天了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you have a fever?
lines.zh: 发烧吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, my temperature was 38.5 this morning.
lines.zh: 是的，今天早上体温38.5度。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Let me take a look at your throat. Open wide, please.
lines.zh: 让我看看你的喉咙。请张大嘴巴。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Ahh... Is it serious?
lines.zh: 啊……严重吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: It's a throat infection. I'll prescribe some antibiotics. Rest for a few days.
lines.zh: 是喉咙感染。我给你开一些抗生素。休息几天就好了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, do you have anything for allergies?
lines.zh: 请问有治过敏的药吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, we have several options. Do you need tablets or a spray?
lines.zh: 有的，有好几种。需要药片还是喷雾？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I'd prefer tablets. What do you recommend?
lines.zh: 我比较想要药片。你有什么推荐的？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: This one is very effective and doesn't cause drowsiness.
lines.zh: 这种非常有效，而且不会引起嗜睡。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How many do I take per day?
lines.zh: 一天吃几次？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: One tablet daily after a meal. And remember to read the instructions.
lines.zh: 每天一片，饭后服用。记得看一下说明书。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: 911 emergency services. What's your emergency?
lines.zh: 911紧急服务。请问有什么紧急情况？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: There's been a car accident at the intersection of Main Street and Park Avenue.
lines.zh: 主街和公园大道交叉口发生了一起车祸。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Are there any injuries?
lines.zh: 有人受伤吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I think two people are hurt. One is bleeding.
lines.zh: 是的，好像有两个人受伤了。有一个在流血。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: An ambulance and police are on their way. Please stay on the line.
lines.zh: 救护车和警察正在路上。请保持通话不要挂断。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Okay, I'll stay here and wait.
lines.zh: 好的，我在这里等着。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, can you help me? I think I lost my phone.
lines.zh: 打扰一下，能帮帮我吗？我好像把手机丢了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Of course. Where did you last have it?
lines.zh: 当然。你最后一次用手机是在哪里？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: I think I left it in a taxi about 20 minutes ago.
lines.zh: 大概20分钟前我可能落在出租车上了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Do you remember the license plate number?
lines.zh: 你还记得车牌号吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: No, I don't. Is there a lost and found office nearby?
lines.zh: 不记得了。附近有失物招领处吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: You can go to the police station around the corner. They can help track the vehicle.
lines.zh: 你可以去拐角处的派出所。他们能帮忙查找车辆。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Hello, I think I left my bag here earlier today.
lines.zh: 你好，我今天早些时候好像把包落在这里了。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Can you describe it?
lines.zh: 你能描述一下吗？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: It's a black leather backpack with a blue keychain on the zipper.
lines.zh: 是一个黑色皮革双肩包，拉链上挂着一个蓝色钥匙扣。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Let me check our lost and found. Yes, we have one that matches that description.
lines.zh: 我查一下失物招领。是的，有一个符合描述的包。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Oh, that's a relief! What do I need to do to get it back?
lines.zh: 哦，那我就放心了！我需要做什么才能拿回它？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Please show me some ID and confirm what's inside the bag.
lines.zh: 请出示一下身份证件，然后确认包里有什么东西。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Sure. There's my wallet, a laptop, and a water bottle.
lines.zh: 好的。里面有我的钱包、一台笔记本电脑和一个水杯。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Excuse me, I lost my wallet on the subway this morning.
lines.zh: 不好意思，我今天早上在地铁上丢了钱包。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Which line were you on?
lines.zh: 很遗憾听到这个。你坐的是哪条线？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Line 5, heading south. I got off at Olympic Park Station around 8:30.
lines.zh: 5号线，往南方向。我大概8点半在奥林匹克公园站下车的。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Let me check the central lost and found system. What does your wallet look like?
lines.zh: 我查一下中央失物招领系统。你的钱包是什么样的？

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: It's a brown leather wallet with my ID card and bank cards inside.
lines.zh: 是一个棕色皮夹，里面有我的身份证和银行卡。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Good news! A wallet matching that description was handed in at the station office. Please bring your ID to claim it.
lines.zh: 好消息！有一个符合描述的钱包被交到了车站办公室。请带上身份证来认领。
